summary: MonoChat MVP first test run — both backend & frontend tested. Backend: 30/30 pytest cases passed (auth, verification gating, country list, AI verification structured response, friend request flow, messaging text+image, chats list, mark-read, non-friend blocking, WebSocket message push, call:unavailable signaling, invalid token rejection). Frontend (390x800 web preview): login as alice@test.com -> Chats tab loads with bob_test conversation, Requests tab search of bob_test shows 'Already connected', tapping chat row opens chat room and a text message is sent and rendered with status tick, Profile tab shows @alice_test + Identity Verified badge + Sign Out returns to auth screen. Signup with brand-new user redirects to /verification and India -> Aadhaar -> ID step with 'From Gallery' button all render correctly. Realtime WS pushes verified at API level (message:new received). No critical issues. Minor non-blocking warnings: shadow* style props deprecated and useNativeDriver/RCTAnimation warning (Expo web platform).

minor.issue: Short password returns HTTP 422 (Pydantic validation error) instead of 400 with custom message — acceptable but inconsistent with other validation errors (400).

issues: Expo web console warnings: deprecated 'shadow*' style props (use 'boxShadow'), and 'props.pointerEvents is deprecated (use style.pointerEvents)' — non-blocking but should be cleaned up for React Native Web compliance.

react_native_issues.issue: Deprecated 'shadow*' style props detected on web. Should migrate to boxShadow or platform-specific shadow API. Reference: console warnings on every screen load.
Deprecated 'props.pointerEvents' usage — should be moved into style.pointerEvents. Reference: console warning emitted from a Pressable/View after login submit.

action_items: (Optional) Replace 'shadow*' style props with boxShadow (or wrap with Platform.OS check) to silence RNW deprecation warnings.
(Optional) Move pointerEvents from prop to style.pointerEvents in the affected component (likely an ActivityIndicator wrapper or overlay).
(Optional) Return a consistent 400 with a friendly message for short passwords instead of FastAPI's default 422 from Pydantic Field(min_length=8).
critical_code_review_comments: server.py is a single 530-line module; consider splitting into routers (auth, verification, friends, chat, ws) once it grows past 700 lines.

Image messages store full base64 in MongoDB documents — fine for MVP but will bloat the DB and the GET /api/messages payload (image_base64 is correctly excluded from /api/chats last_message projection).
/api/messages does not validate type='image' payload size or MIME prefix — consider a max length / prefix check before persisting.

WebSocket handler silently drops 'rtc:*'/'call:*' events without ack when target offline (only 'call:request' emits 'call:unavailable'). For better UX, also emit 'call:unavailable' for 'rtc:offer' when target is offline.
seed_data_creation: Re-ran /app/backend/seed_test_users.py — alice_test and bob_test already present and verified (idempotent). Multiple TEST_/newuser_* signups were created during testing and friendship between alice & bob is now established in MongoDB.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Backend URL: EXPO_PUBLIC_BACKEND_URL=https://face-verify-chat-2.preview.emergentagent.com. Seeded verified users: alice@test.com / Test@1234 (alice_test), bob@test.com / Test@1234 (bob_test) — alice and bob are NOW FRIENDS in DB (created during this test run); the Requests search shows 'Already connected'. Test pytest file: /app/backend/tests/test_monochat_api.py — reuse it for regression. WebSocket tests require websockets and pillow pip packages (already installed). AI verification endpoint (/api/verification/submit) was hit once and returned structured response — uses LLM credits, avoid hammering it.
rca_of_issue: No bug RCA needed — all targeted backend and frontend flows passed. The earlier chat-row click 'failed' on the first frontend run was a test-script timing issue (clicked the row, then immediately tried to interact before router push completed) — re-run with a wait_for_timeout(2500) after click confirmed the chat-room screen opens, message sends, and bubble renders with the status tick.
